titles: 코스피 6,506을 만든 건 2,400개 아니야, 두 회사야 — 67% 캐리의 진짜 얼굴
같은 한은이 같은 주에 호황과 침체를 발표한 날 — 38년 만의 K자의 날
반도체 빼면 GDP 0.77% — ING가 '5월 인하' 아닌 '하반기 인상'을 말하는 이유

image_concepts.A: 익명 한은 정책위원 인물 클로즈업 + 양옆에 정반대로 솟고 가라앉는 두 숫자 '72%'(SK하이닉스 영업이익률·골드 상승)와 '0.77%'(반도체 빼면 GDP·블루 하락)
image_concepts.B: 거대한 '6,506' 숫자가 두 톱니바퀴(SK하이닉스 칩 패턴 / 삼성전자 칩 패턴) 위에 올라앉아 있고, 두 톱니가 67% 영역을 차지하는 K자 양극화 인포그래픽
image_concepts.C: 1988년과 2026년 데자뷰 이중 시대 오버레이 — 빈티지 64K D램 칩과 현대 HBM 메모리 칩이 거대한 모래시계 안에서 마주 보고, 중앙에 빛나는 황금 빛 줄기

thumbnails.concept_ko: A안 승리 공식: 익명의 한은 정책위원급 동아시아 남성(50대 후반) 인물 클로즈업, 어두운 한국은행 기자회견장 배경. 그의 우측 어깨 위로 거대한 골드 숫자 '72%'가 상승 화살표와 함께 떠오르고, 좌측 어깨 위로 차가운 블루 숫자 '0.77%'가 하락 화살표와 함께 가라앉는다. 표정은 냉정하고 긴장된 단호함. 정면 키 라이트로 얼굴은 또렷하게 밝게. 골드 vs 블루 split 라이팅. 짧은 한글 텍스트는 후작업 오버레이로 처리.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic close-up portrait of an anonymous East Asian senior central bank policymaker man in his late 50s, wearing a dark navy suit with subtle pinstripe, captured in three-quarter view with a stern composed expression at a Bank of Korea press briefing. His face is fully illuminated by a strong frontal key light from front-left, eyes catching a clear highlight, skin tone naturally bright and readable. Behind him, a dimly lit Bank of Korea press room with subtle institutional lettering on the wall. To his right shoulder area, a massive luminous red-gold number '72%' rises with a strong upward arrow, glowing with bright metallic gold. To his left shoulder area, an equally massive cold cyan number '0.77%' falls with a downward arrow, both numbers floating like contradictory headlines from the same central bank. Newsroom crisis aesthetic with dramatic split lighting (warm gold from one side, cold cyan from the other). The composition emphasizes the paradox between the two numbers from the same source. Bright editorial lighting, high-contrast and high-saturation rather than moody chiaroscuro, optimized for mobile YouTube thumbnail visibility at small sizes. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements

thumbnails.concept_ko: B안 대조군: 거대한 코스피 숫자 '6,506'이 화면 상단에 골드로 빛나고, 그 아래 두 거대한 톱니바퀴(좌측은 'SK' 칩 패턴, 우측은 'Samsung' 칩 패턴)가 그 숫자를 받치고 있는 구도. 두 톱니 둘레에는 67%를 차지하는 황금 영역과 33% 회색 영역이 파이 차트처럼 표시된다. 깊은 코발트 네이비 배경, 모바일에서도 또렷한 고채도. 한글 텍스트는 후작업 오버레이.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic high-end financial infographic with bright vivid lighting. At the upper portion of the frame, a colossal luminous metallic gold number '6,506' floats prominently with a soft golden glow halo, set in a bold modern sans-serif font against a saturated cobalt navy background with faint grid texture. Directly below the number, two massive interlocking gear wheels stand side by side, each etched with abstract semiconductor circuit patterns (no readable logos). The left gear glows in luminous bright gold with sharp sparks of light, the right gear glows in slightly cooler bright bronze. Together the two gears support and uplift the giant '6,506' number. Around the gears, a stylized luminous arc shows a 67% bright gold sector and a 33% dim grey sector, like a pie chart embedded into the gear ring, with small ivory labels '67%' and '33%' visible on the arc. Bright punchy volumetric light rays radiate outward from the gears. Color palette: vivid cobalt navy #1B3A8E, luminous metallic gold #FFC83D, ivory accents, single red accent on the small '33%' label. Lighting style: bright editorial high-contrast, optimized for mobile YouTube thumbnail visibility. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements

thumbnails.concept_ko: 와일드카드: 거대한 황금빛 모래시계가 화면 중앙에 우뚝 서 있고, 위쪽 절반에는 1988년 빈티지 64K D램 칩이 따뜻한 황금 세피아 빛에 잠겨 있으며, 아래쪽 절반에는 2026년 현대 HBM 메모리 스택 칩이 차가운 코발트 푸른 빛에 잠겨 있다. 모래시계 잘록한 허리 부분에서 빛나는 황금 빛 줄기가 두 시대를 잇는다. 좌상단에 작은 빛나는 숫자 '1988', 우하단에 '2026'. 인물·지역 명시 0건 (Gemini 거부 회피). 한글 텍스트는 후작업 오버레이.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Stylized cinematic illustration of a giant luminous golden hourglass standing prominently at the center of the frame against a deep saturated indigo background. The upper bulb of the hourglass contains a vintage 1980s-era integrated circuit chip (small ceramic DIP package with visible pins and weathered serif markings) bathed in warm bright golden-sepia light, surrounded by glowing amber dust particles. The lower bulb contains a modern stacked HBM-style high-bandwidth memory chip module rendered in vivid cobalt blue light, surrounded by glowing cyan particles. At the narrow neck of the hourglass, a brilliant radiant golden vertical light ray flows from upper bulb to lower bulb, with falling sand particles transforming from amber to cobalt mid-flow. In the upper-left of the frame, a small glowing gold number '1988' hovers in elegant modern serif. In the lower-right of the frame, a small glowing gold number '2026' hovers in matching style. Bright vibrant amber-gold versus saturated cobalt-blue palette against deep indigo. Cinematic atmospheric mood with high-contrast bright editorial lighting rather than melancholic dimness, optimized for mobile YouTube thumbnail visibility. No people, no place names, no era-specific landmarks. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements
